items.summary: Remove any public display of user Principal IDs across the entire UI (including public profiles, profile popovers, post/message author areas, server lists, DM lists, and any other user surfaces). The app must never show another user’s Principal ID anywhere in the UI.

In the signed-in user’s Profile & Settings page, add a user-only control to reveal/hide their own Principal ID (hidden by default on load), and include a copy-to-clipboard action. Do not show the Principal ID on this page unless the user explicitly chooses to reveal it.

Extend backend user profiles to support additional fields (at minimum: bio and join date) and per-field public/private visibility controls for all profile fields (including display name, avatar, bio, join date, and any other stored profile fields). Public profile queries must only return fields marked public to non-owners, while the profile owner must be able to fetch and edit all fields and visibility settings.

Update the Profile & Settings UI to allow the signed-in user to edit bio and manage per-field public/private visibility toggles for all supported profile fields. All user-facing text for these controls must be in English.

Update all profile display surfaces (including the profile popover and any public profile UI) to show meaningful public profile information (e.g., display name, avatar, bio, join date when public) rather than showing only a Principal ID. Do not display non-public fields to other users.

Fix server management controls visibility so that server edit/delete (and related management) actions appear for the actual server owner. Ensure ownership checks are based on the server owner Principal and the frontend permission checks use the owner Principal returned by the backend.

Enhance @mention UX by formatting mentions in rendered post/message text and making mentions clickable to open a user profile surface (e.g., profile popover). Mentions must resolve to the correct user identity (Principal) for profile lookup, without exposing Principal IDs in the UI.

Add any required conditional state migration to preserve existing user profiles when upgrading the backend profile schema, initializing new fields and visibility settings with safe defaults and setting join date for existing users where appropriate.
